title: JSON Pretty Printer
scenario: Take a JSON object as input and output a formatted JSON string with proper indentation and line breaks.
constraints: Must be a JSON string with proper indentation and line breaks
Must be wrapped in double quotes

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the generated JSON string is syntactically correct.
Evaluate if the JSON string is easy to read due to proper indentation and formatting.
Check if the generated JSON string meets the constraints (indentation and line breaks).
